example_memories.value: User prefers Python for scripting and TypeScript for web apps
User likes concise responses with code examples, no fluff
Senior backend engineer at a fintech startup
Python/FastAPI backend, React frontend, PostgreSQL, Redis, deployed on AWS ECS
github.com/example/payments-api — monorepo with services/ and libs/ directories
Never deploy on Fridays. Always run the full test suite before merging to main.
Use Black for Python formatting, Prettier for JS/TS. Max line length 100.
